Dignified Personal Care in Deerfield Beach, Florida

Our trained personal care aides help with Activities of Daily Living (ADLs) including bathing, shower assistance, grooming, oral care, dressing, toileting, incontinence care, and safe transfers and mobility. Every interaction is handled with dignity, patience, and respect for your loved one's preferences and comfort level.

Serving the Deerfield Beach area in Broward County, our caregivers are background-checked, AHCA-licensed, bonded, and insured. Whether you need a few hours of personal care per week or daily support, we create a personalized care plan that fits your family's needs and budget.

What's Included in Personal Care in Deerfield Beach

  • Bathing and shower assistance with safety protocols
  • Grooming — hair care, shaving, nail care, oral hygiene
  • Dressing assistance respecting personal preferences
  • Toileting and incontinence care with dignity
  • Safe transfers and mobility assistance
  • Skin care and basic wound monitoring

With our headquarters in West Palm Beach and caregivers throughout Broward County, we know the Deerfield Beach community. Our local presence means faster response times, caregivers familiar with local hospitals and physicians, and a team that truly understands the needs of North Broward families.

Frequently Asked Questions: Personal Care in Deerfield Beach

What are Activities of Daily Living (ADLs)?

ADLs include bathing, dressing, grooming, eating, toileting, and transferring. Our caregivers assist with any or all of these while preserving independence.

Will I have the same caregiver each visit?

We prioritize consistency. Most clients have a primary caregiver with a backup for scheduling flexibility, ensuring your loved one is always comfortable.

Do your caregivers have special training?

Yes. All personal care aides complete state-certified training, background checks, and ongoing education in senior care best practices.

Do you serve Deerfield Beach, FL?

Yes! Senior Trusted Home Care proudly serves Deerfield Beach and all communities in Broward County, Florida. Our caregivers are local and familiar with the area.

How do I get started with personal care in Deerfield Beach?

Simply call us at 561-621-5700 or visit our website to request a free consultation. We'll schedule an in-home assessment in Deerfield Beach at a time that works for you.

Other Services in Deerfield Beach

Companionship Care

Genuine companionship and emotional support to help seniors feel valued, connected, and engaged.

Light Housekeeping

Light cleaning, laundry, meal preparation, and dishwashing so clients can live safely at home.

Medication Reminders

Timely medication reminders and safety checks to help seniors stay on schedule and maintain a secure living environment.

Memory Care

Gentle, structured support for individuals living with Alzheimer's or other forms of dementia.
